title: Improving comparison of power and level for conservative multiplier bootstrap tests in simulation studies and beyond
author: Sakhanenko, Lyudmila
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We propose a simple modification procedure that helps to compare the levels and powers for conservative multiplier bootstrap tests. It is especially useful for simulation studies where empirical levels are zero. We provide a theoretical justification and illustrate the use of the procedure in a recent class of multiplier bootstrap tests for quantile regression and in a recent class of high-dimensional tests for MANOVA.
steps_raw: We propose a simple modification procedure that helps to compare the levels and powers for conservative multiplier bootstrap tests. It is especially useful for simulation studies where empirical levels are zero. We provide a theoretical justification and illustrate the use of the procedure in a recent class of multiplier bootstrap tests for quantile regression and in a recent class of high-dimensional tests for MANOVA.
